title: Practical advantages of sterile prefilled syringes.
text: Ready-to-use PFS presentations support controlled handling, cleaner workflows, and consistent product use across institutional healthcare environments.

items.title: Reduced handling risk
items.text: Ready-to-use presentations help limit extra preparation touchpoints before administration.

items.title: Accurate pre-measured fill
items.text: Standardized fill volumes support repeatable handling and clearer product use in clinical workflows.

items.title: Convenient administration
items.text: PFS formats simplify preparation steps for healthcare teams working in time-sensitive environments.

items.title: Lower wastage potential
items.text: Pre-filled single-use formats can help reduce product loss compared with manual preparation.
